scenarios.profile: Answers quickly and persuasively but skips definitions and evidence.
scenarios.adaptation: Require term locks, slow proposition extraction, and written revision before debate.

scenarios.profile: Avoids disagreement and weakens claims to keep peace.
scenarios.adaptation: Use low-stakes objection practice, steelman drills, and confidence-building spoken explanations.
Require charitable reconstruction, repair packets, and ethical rhetoric constraints before live debate.
